**Frontend (quimibond-intelligence/main):**
- 3 materialized views: partner_payment_profile (1020), journal_flow_profile (15), account_payment_profile (342)
- refresh_cashflow_profiles() RPC para cron semanal
- UI /finanzas#profiles con 3 cards de validación
- cashflow_ar_predicted v3 → partner profiles + snap_to_day_of_month()
- cashflow_ap_predicted v3 → outbound partner profiles
- cashflow_payroll/opex/tax_monthly v3 → account_payment_profile
- SO/PO backlog v3 → partner profiles + filtro >12

**Tier 1 (alto impacto, alcanzable):**
1. Push account.move.line daily en qb19 (2h) — habilita timing exacto de ISR día 17, IMSS último del mes, nómina quincenal real
2. FX rate consistency — unificar cfo_dashboard y working_capital al mismo rate source (COALESCE current_balance_mxn everywhere)
3. Backtesting semanal — snapshot projected_cash_flow_weekly cada lunes vs actual, calcular MAPE por categoría
4. BELSUEÑO perfil — $2.66M en 42 facturas abiertas sin payment profile (investigar si paga b

- AP overdue: $20.7M, AR overdue: $7.6M
- Payroll: $1.81M/mes, OpEx: $2.75M/mes, Tax: $965K/mes

- 72/73 proveedores AP con perfil (99.7% del monto)

type: project
---

Quimibond migro a Odoo 19 en noviembre 2025.

**Why:** Upgrade de version anterior de Odoo a Odoo 19 en Odoo.sh.

**How to apply:** Muchos hallazgos de la auditoria se explican por la migracion, no por errores contables:
- CAPA residual $7.09M en Nov-Dic = migracion interrumpio flujo de valoracion
- 17 categorias sin account_stock_variation_id =

name: Syntage SAT integration (Quimibond)
description: Estado de la integración Syntage + roadmap de fases pendientes (spec/plan + decisiones de arquitectura ya cerradas)
type: project
originSessionId: 1d1a1d3c-b84a-4b5e-92f0-232ae835fb56
---

### Completado
- **Fase 1 (Plumbing)**: 11 tablas `syntage_*` en Supabase (7 datos + 3 plumbing + 1 entity_map), 9 migraciones + drop-FK 20260417, 10 event handlers, webhook endpoint `/api/syntage/webhook`, `/api/syntage/backfill` admin, `/api/syntage/health`. 45 tests. Spec en `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-16-syntage-integration-design.md`. Plan en `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-16-syntage-fase-1-plumbing.md`.
- **Fase 2 (Onboarding)**: entidad Quimibond (RFC `PNT920218IW5` → `odoo_company_i

- Multi-tenant community self-governance platform (network state infrastructure)
- Tech stack: React + TypeScript + Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, Supabase, TanStack Query, Recharts, SheetJS, date-fns
- 5 primitives: Identity, Treasury, Governance, Census, Federation + Ingestion layer
- Beachhead vertical: Residential condominiums in Mexico

- Supabase typed client: Use `(supabase.from('table') as any)` for insert/update/delete to workaround strict generated types
- All hooks use `useCommunityContext()` which returns `{ communityId }` (not `community.id`)
- Custom UI components (no Radix) — Dialog, Tabs, etc. are all custom implementations in `src/shared/components/ui/`
- Badge component has custom `success` and `warning` variants
- Spanish-language UI labels throughout

- `src/core/identity/` - Auth, members, roles, invitations
- `src/core/treasury/` - Financial dashboard (read layer), transactions, budgets
- `src/core/governance/` - Proposals, voting, delegations, minutes
- `src/ingestion/` - CSV/Excel import pipeline with column mapping, category mapping, dedup
- `src/verticals/residential/` - Units, maintenance requests
- `src/federation/` & `src/census/` - Placeholder types only

- Recharts Tooltip `formatter` type: Use `(value) => ...` not `(value: number) => ...`
- tsconfig has `noUnusedLocals: false`, `noUnusedParameters: false` for dev velocity
- File adapter pattern: `csvAdapter` and `excelAdapter` implement `FileAdapter` interface

- `npm run build` = `tsc -b && vite build`
- Bundle: ~1.2MB (380KB gzip) — recharts + xlsx are the big deps
- Supabase migrations in `supabase/migrations/001-007`

Budget 2026 system for Quimibond (Productora de No Tejidos). Odoo 19 JSON-RPC integration.
Architecture: Extractors → Processors → Generators → Excel output with openpyxl.

- Ventas presupuesto 2026: $297M (vs historical ~$165M avg)
- MP $160M (54%), MO $44.8M, CIF $28.3M, Gastos $10.7M
- Margen bruto 21.4%, Margen operativo 17.8%
- 70 cuentas contables en presupuesto, 252 en Odoo
- Escenario PESIMISTA (solo línea): $189M ventas, $33.5M UO
- Escenario OPTIMISTA (todos): $297M ventas, $52.9M UO

INDICE, VENTAS(121), TIPOS_CAMBIO(4 monedas), BOM_EXPLOSION(895),
LISTA_PRECIOS_MP(107), MP_REQUERIDA(891), MO_DETALLE(1934), CIF_GASTOS(6325),
RESUMEN_PRODUCTO(92), RESUMEN_GENERAL, RESUMEN_POR_ESCENARIO,
EDR_CONSOLIDADO, EDR_PESIMISTA, EDR_OPTIMISTA,
EDR_POR_CUENTA_CONTABLE(559), RESUMEN_CUENTAS_CONTABLES(70),
EDR_INDUSTRIAL, EDR_CONFECCION

- LÍNEA/CLIENTE NORMAL: 84 productos, $213M, 28% margen
- NUEVO CLIENTE/PROYECTOS: 8 productos, $84M, -23% margen
- PESIMISTA = solo LÍNEA, OPTIMISTA = TODOS (= consolidado)

- 21 products confección labeled DIVISA="USD" but prices already in MXN
- Fix: `src/extractors/ventas.py` auto-corrects USD→MXN on load
- TIPOS_CAMBIO: monthly TC (MONEDA, CODIGO, ENE...DIC, PROMEDIO)
- VENTAS: VALOR_MES = QTY × PU × INDEX(TC_mes) formulas
- LISTA_PRECIOS_MP: VLOOKUP references TIPOS_CAMBIO!B:O (PROMEDIO col)

- ALL percentages stored as DECIMALS (0.21 not 21) for Excel 0.00% format
- Affected: edr.py, resumenes.py, cuentas_contables.py, hoja_resumen_escenario.py

1-7: BOM self-refs, MO grouping, CIF classification, EDR ventas, gastos proration, RESUMEN_CUENTAS, DIVISA USD
8. LISTA_PRECIOS_MP VLOOKUP B:C → B:O (PROMEDIO)
9. BOM QTY_TOTAL column Y → Z
10. Percentages *100 with 0.00% format → decimals
11. RESUMEN_CUENTAS $0 for 401.01 → shows VENTAS for income accounts
12. INDICE missing escenario sheets → added
13. INDICE created at end for working hyperlinks

- venv at `./venv/bin/python3`
- Config: `config/settings.py`, `config/odoo_config.py`
- Output: `data/output/ARCHIVO_MAESTRO_OPTIMIZADO_*.xlsx`
- Tests: `tests/` (24 tests, all pass)
- Odoo connection: `src/odoo/connection.py` with `execute_kw` method
File unknown was edited 419 times this session — likely a hot path worth monitoring.
